name: TFF PHARMACEUTICALS INC
summary: TFF PHARMACEUTICALS INC is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative drug products using its Thin Film Freezing (TFF) technology platform. TFF is used to improve the solubility and bioavailability of poorly water-soluble drugs, with headquarters in Fort Worth, Texas. TFF Pharmaceuticals aims to develop new and improved therapies for a variety of diseases.
